---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(pracma)
#library(peakPick)
library(quantmod)
library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(forecast)
library(tsibble)
library(broom)
library(tidyquant)
library(tsbox)
library("pheatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggfortify)
library(viridis) # Default Color Maps from 'matplotlib' 
library(hrbrthemes)
library(data.table)
library(superheat)
library(colorspace)
library(ggpubr)
```

## load existing/saved environment (.RData)
```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
setwd(Path_1)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData",  sep = "/")
load(file=saved_path)
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
```

# save environment (.RData)
```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData",  sep = "/")
save.image(file=saved_path)
```

# read csv files from the parent folder
```{r}
library(readr)  # For faster CSV reading
library(dplyr)  # For easy data manipulation (optional)

# Function to import all CSVs from a folder and its subfolders
import_csv_files <- function(directory) {
  # Get list of all CSV files in the folder and subfolders
  csv_files <- list.files(directory, pattern = "\\measurements.csv$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  # Read each file into a list of data frames
  data_list <- lapply(csv_files, read_csv, show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  # Name the list elements with the corresponding file names (without the full path)
  names(data_list) <- dirname(csv_files) %>% basename()
  
  return(data_list)
}

# Set the parent directory containing CSV files
parent_directory <- Path_1 

# Import all CSV files
csv_data_list <- import_csv_files(parent_directory)
```

```{r}
csv_data_list_1 <- csv_data_list[1:3] #20, 60, 40
csv_data_list_2 <- csv_data_list[4:6] #20, 60, 60
csv_data_list_3 <- csv_data_list[7:25] #20, 75, 40

csv_1 <- reduce(csv_data_list_1,  left_join, by = '...1')
csv_2 <- reduce(csv_data_list_2,  left_join, by = '...1')
csv_3 <- reduce(csv_data_list_3,  left_join, by = '...1')
```

```{r}
csv_1_norm <- sweep(                       # sweep “across” the chosen margin
  as.matrix(csv_1[-1]),                        # ensure a matrix (for sweep)
  MARGIN = 2,                          # 2 = columns
  STATS  = colMeans(csv_1[-1], na.rm = TRUE),  # vector of column means
  FUN    = "/"
) %>% as.data.table()

csv_2_norm <- sweep(                       # sweep “across” the chosen margin
  as.matrix(csv_2[-1]),                        # ensure a matrix (for sweep)
  MARGIN = 2,                          # 2 = columns
  STATS  = colMeans(csv_2[-1], na.rm = TRUE),  # vector of column means
  FUN    = "/"
) %>% as.data.table()

csv_3_norm <- sweep(                       # sweep “across” the chosen margin
  as.matrix(csv_3[-1]),                        # ensure a matrix (for sweep)
  MARGIN = 2,                          # 2 = columns
  STATS  = colMeans(csv_3[-1], na.rm = TRUE),  # vector of column means
  FUN    = "/"
) %>% as.data.table()


csv_1_norm$Period <- "Pre"
csv_1_norm$Period [21:80] <- "Act"
csv_1_norm$Period [81:120] <- "Post"

csv_2_norm$Period  <- "Pre"
csv_2_norm$Period [21:80] <- "Act"
csv_2_norm$Period [81:140] <- "Post"

csv_3_norm$Period  <- "Pre"
csv_3_norm$Period [21:95] <- "Act"
csv_3_norm$Period [96:155] <- "Post"

csv_1_norm_long <- csv_1_norm %>% pivot_longer(!Period, names_to = "Cell", values_to = "Int")
csv_2_norm_long <- csv_2_norm %>% pivot_longer(!Period, names_to = "Cell", values_to = "Int")
csv_3_norm_long <- csv_3_norm %>% pivot_longer(!Period, names_to = "Cell", values_to = "Int")
```

```{r}
csv_all_long <- rbind(csv_1_norm_long, csv_2_norm_long, csv_3_norm_long) %>% as.data.table()

csv_all_long [, c("Batch", "Cell_num", "Roi") :=
      tstrsplit(Cell, "_Cell|\\.tif_", perl = TRUE)]

csv_all_long[, cell_tif := paste0("Cell_", Cell_num)][, Cell_num := NULL]

csv_all_long[, img := sub("\\.tif.*$", "", Cell)]
```

```{r}
csv_all_summary  <- csv_all_long %>% group_by(Cell, Period, Batch, cell_tif, Roi, img) %>% rstatix::get_summary_stats(Int) %>% as.data.table()
```

```{r}
csv_all_summary_filtered <- csv_all_summary[!grepl("useless", Cell, ignore.case = TRUE)]
csv_all_summary_filtered <- csv_all_summary_filtered [!grepl("soma", Cell, ignore.case = TRUE)]
csv_all_summary_filtered[, rank := frank(-mean, ties.method = "first"), by = .(Period, img)] # give rank within Rois of each image during each event based on the max intensity
```

```{r}
Act_summary <- csv_all_summary_filtered [Period == "Act" & rank == 1] # filter for rows with the highest intensity among the Rois of each image during activation window

csv_all_summary_filtered <- csv_all_summary_filtered[Cell %in% Act_summary$Cell] # filter for Roi with highest int during activation


csv_all_summary_filtered_wide <- csv_all_summary_filtered %>% pivot_wider(id_cols=c("Cell", "Batch", "cell_tif", "Roi", "img"), names_from = Period, values_from = mean) %>% as.data.table()

csv_all_summary_filtered <- csv_all_summary_filtered_wide[Act>Pre] %>% pivot_longer(cols = c("Pre", "Act", "Post"), names_to = "Period", values_to = "Int")

selected_cell <- csv_all_summary_filtered$img %>%  unique()
```

```{r}
csv_all_summary_filtered <- csv_all_summary[!grepl("useless", Cell, ignore.case = TRUE)]
csv_all_summary_filtered <- csv_all_summary_filtered [!grepl("soma", Cell, ignore.case = TRUE)]
csv_all_summary_filtered[, rank := frank(-mean, ties.method = "first"), by = .(Period, img)] # give rank within Rois of each image during each event based on the max intensity
```

```{r}

Act_summary <- csv_all_summary_filtered [Period == "Act" & rank == 2 & img %in% selected_cell] # filter for rows with the highest intensity among the Rois of each image during activation window

csv_all_summary_filtered <- csv_all_summary_filtered[Cell %in% Act_summary$Cell] # filter for Roi with highest int during activation


```

```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
my_comparisons <- csv_all_summary_filtered$Period %>% unique() %>% as.character() %>% combn(2, simplify = FALSE) 
pj <- position_jitter(seed = 1, width = .1, height = 0)

csv_all_summary_filtered %>% mutate(Period= factor(Period, levels=c("Pre", "Act", "Post")))  %>%

ggplot(aes(x=Period, y=mean, fill=Period))+
  #geom_point()
  theme_classic()+
 geom_violin(aes(), trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=0.8, scale = "width")  +
 geom_boxplot(aes(), width=0.2, fill="white", outlier.colour = NA)+ 
  
 # geom_jitter(alpha=1, aes(color = period), position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width=.1)) + 
  
 geom_point(position = pj) +
  
 geom_path(aes(group = img),alpha = 0.5, position = pj)+
 stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, test = "wilcox.test", paired=F)+

# scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0.6, 1.5), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))+ 

  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
 theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold"), axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0)) #for centering the text 
```



```{r}
ggsave(
  "Pre_act_Post_1.pdf",
  width = 9,
  height = 6,
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")
```

```{r}
csv_all_summary_filtered <- csv_all_summary[!grepl("useless", Cell, ignore.case = TRUE)]
csv_all_summary_filtered <- csv_all_summary_filtered [!grepl("soma", Cell, ignore.case = TRUE)]
#csv_all_summary_filtered[, rank := frank(-mean, ties.method = "first"), by = .(Period, img)] # give rank within Rois of each image during each event based on the max intensity
```

```{r}
csv_all_summary_filtered_wide <- csv_all_summary_filtered %>% pivot_wider(id_cols=c("Cell", "Batch", "cell_tif", "Roi", "img"), names_from = Period, values_from = mean) %>% as.data.table()

csv_all_summary_filtered_wide$Diff <- csv_all_summary_filtered_wide$Act -csv_all_summary_filtered_wide$Pre
#csv_all_summary_filtered_wide[, rank := frank(-Diff, ties.method = "first"), by = .(img)] 

csv_all_summary_filtered <- csv_all_summary_filtered_wide[Diff > 0] %>% pivot_longer(cols = c("Pre", "Act", "Post"), names_to = "Period", values_to = "Int") %>% as.data.table()
selected_cell <- csv_all_summary_filtered$img %>%  unique()
```

```{r}
csv_all_summary_filtered <- csv_all_summary[!grepl("useless", Cell, ignore.case = TRUE)]
csv_all_summary_filtered <- csv_all_summary_filtered [!grepl("soma", Cell, ignore.case = TRUE)]
#csv_all_summary_filtered[, rank := frank(-mean, ties.method = "first"), by = .(Period, img)] # give rank within Rois of each image during each event based on the max intensity
```

```{r}
csv_all_summary_filtered_wide <- csv_all_summary_filtered [img %in% selected_cell] %>% 
  pivot_wider(id_cols=c("Cell", "Batch", "cell_tif", "Roi", "img"), names_from = Period, values_from = mean) %>% 
  as.data.table()# filter for rows with the highest intensity among the Rois of each image during activation window

csv_all_summary_filtered_wide$Diff <- csv_all_summary_filtered_wide$Act -csv_all_summary_filtered_wide$Pre

csv_all_summary_filtered <- csv_all_summary_filtered_wide[, rank := frank(-Diff, ties.method = "first"), by = .(img)]  %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = c("Pre", "Act", "Post"), names_to = "Period", values_to = "Int") %>% 
  as.data.table()

csv_all_summary_filtered$Cell %>% table()
```


```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
#my_comparisons <- csv_all_summary_filtered$Period %>% unique() %>% as.character() %>% combn(2, simplify = FALSE) 
my_comparisons <- list(c("Pre", "Act"))


pj <- position_jitter(seed = 1, width = .1, height = 0)

csv_all_summary_filtered [rank ==3 & Period != "Post"] %>% mutate(Period= factor(Period, levels=c("Pre", "Act")))  %>%

ggplot(aes(x=Period, y=Int, fill=Period))+
  #geom_point()
  theme_classic()+
 geom_violin(aes(), trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=0.8, scale = "width")  +
 geom_boxplot(aes(), width=0.2, fill="white", outlier.colour = NA)+ 
  
 # geom_jitter(alpha=1, aes(color = period), position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width=.1)) + 
  
 geom_point(position = pj) +
  
 geom_path(aes(group = img),alpha = 0.5, position = pj)+
 stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, test = "wilcox.test", paired=T)+

 scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0.4, 2), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8))+ 

  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
 theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold"), axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0)) #for centering the text 
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "Pre_act_Post_2.pdf",
  width = 3,
  height = 6,
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")
```

```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
my_comparisons <- csv_all_summary_filtered$rank %>% unique() %>% as.character() %>% combn(2, simplify = FALSE) 

csv_all_summary_filtered$rank <- csv_all_summary_filtered$rank %>% as.factor()
pj <- position_jitter(seed = 1, width = .1, height = 0)

csv_all_summary_filtered [Period == "Act"] %>% 
  mutate(rank= factor(rank, levels=c("1", "2", "3")))  %>% 
  arrange(img, rank) %>%   

 ggplot(aes(x=rank, y=Diff, fill=rank))+
  #geom_point()
  theme_classic()+
 geom_violin(aes(), trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=0.8, scale = "width")  +
 geom_boxplot(aes(), width=0.2, fill="white", outlier.colour = NA)+ 
  
 # geom_jitter(alpha=1, aes(color = period), position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width=.1)) + 
  
 geom_point(position = pj) +
  
 geom_path(aes(group = img),alpha = 0.5, position = pj)+
 stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, test = "wilcox.test", paired=T)+

 scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-0.8, 0.8), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8))+ 

  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
 theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold"), axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0)) #for centering the text 

#plotly::ggplotly(p)
#csv_all_summary_filtered [Period == "Act"]$rank %>% table()
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "Diff_GC_ordered.pdf",
  width = 9,
  height = 6,
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")
```

```{r}
csv_all_summary_filtered [Period == "Act"] %>% 
  mutate(rank= factor(rank, levels=c("1", "2", "3")))  %>% 
  arrange(img, rank) %>% write_csv("Diff_GC_ordered.csv")
```


```{r}
friedman_result <- csv_all_summary_filtered [Period == "Act"] %>% 
  mutate(rank= factor(rank, levels=c("1", "2", "3")))  %>% 
  arrange(img, rank) %>%   
  rstatix::friedman_test(Diff ~ rank | img)

posthoc <- csv_all_summary_filtered [Period == "Act"] %>% 
  mutate(rank= factor(rank, levels=c("1", "2", "3")))  %>% 
  arrange(img, rank) %>% 
  rstatix::wilcox_test(
    Diff ~ rank,
    paired = TRUE,
    p.adjust.method = "bonferroni"
  )

print(posthoc)
```

# Direct comparison of length difference before and after perfusion
# compare the length change between DMSO and CK-666 (soma)
```{r}
df_summary_diff <- length_df %>% 
  group_by(perfusion_compartment, exp, cell) %>%  
  rstatix::get_summary_stats(Diff) %>% 
  as.data.table()

df_summary_diff_soma <- df_summary_diff[perfusion_compartment == "soma"]

df_summary_diff_max <- df_summary_diff[max > 0]
df_summary_diff_min <- df_summary_diff[min < 0]
```


# remove outliers
```{r}
outliers <- df_summary_diff_soma  %>% 
  group_by(exp) %>% 
 rstatix::identify_outliers(mean) 

  df_summary_diff_soma <-  df_summary_diff_soma [! (cell %in% outliers$cell), ]
  
```

```{r}
outliers <-  df_summary_diff_max %>% 
  group_by(exp) %>% 
 rstatix::identify_outliers(max) 

  df_summary_diff_max <-  df_summary_diff_max [! (cell %in% outliers$cell), ]
  
```


```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
my_comparisons <- list(c("DMSO", "CK-666"))

 df_summary_diff_soma %>% mutate(exp = factor(exp, levels=c("DMSO", "CK-666")))  %>%
  
 ggplot(aes(x=exp, y=mean, fill=exp)) + 
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)+
  geom_boxplot(width=0.5, fill="white", outlier.shape = NA)  +
  geom_point(aes(fill=exp, group=cell), position = position_jitter(0.1))+
 # geom_line(aes(), position = position_dodge(0.05)) +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=F, method="t.test")+
 #scale_y_continuous( expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-25, 5), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 7))+
  
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
  
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 

 #plotly::ggplotly(p)
```
```{r}
ggsave(
  "CK666_DMSO_soma_length.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")

dev.off()
```

# split the soma data into perfused and non-perfused neurites based on neurite length
```{r}
length_df_soma <- length_df[perfusion_compartment == "soma"]

length_df_soma$site <- "perfused"
length_df_soma[`1_pre_perfusion` >50 ]$site <- "non-perfused"

length_df_soma$group <- paste(length_df_soma$exp, length_df_soma$site, sep = "_")
length_df_soma$cell_neurite <- paste(length_df_soma$cell, length_df_soma$neurite, sep = "_")

length_df_soma_1 <- length_df_soma
```

# remove outliers
```{r}
outliers <- length_df_soma_1  %>% 
  group_by(group) %>% 
 rstatix::identify_outliers(mean) 

length_df_soma_1 <-  length_df_soma_1[! (cell_neurite %in% outliers$cell_neurite), ]
length_df_soma_1 <-  length_df_soma_1[! (cell %in% "Control_20250313_2_ext_ret"), ]

length_df_soma_1$group %>% table()
```


```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
my_comparisons <- list(c("DMSO_perfused", "DMSO_non-perfused"), c("CK-666_perfused", "CK-666_non-perfused"), c("DMSO_perfused", "CK-666_perfused"), c("DMSO_non-perfused", "CK-666_non-perfused"))

length_df_soma_1 %>% #mutate(exp = factor(exp, levels=c("DMSO", "CK-666")))  %>%
  
 ggplot(aes(x=group, y=Diff, fill=exp)) + 
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)+
  geom_boxplot(width=0.5, fill="white", outlier.shape = NA)  +
  geom_point(aes(fill=exp, group=cell), position = position_jitter(0.1))+
 # geom_line(aes(), position = position_dodge(0.05)) +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=F, method="t.test")+
scale_y_continuous( expand = c(0, 0), 
                    limits = c(-50, 80), 
                    breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8))+
  
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
  
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 

 #plotly::ggplotly(p)
```
```{r}
ggsave(
  "CK666_DMSO_soma_length_50_neuriteLevel.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")

#dev.off()
```

# analyze at cell level
```{r}
df_summary_diff_soma <- length_df_soma %>% 
  group_by(exp, site, cell, group) %>%  
  rstatix::get_summary_stats(Diff) %>% 
  as.data.table()
```

# remove outliers
```{r}
outliers <- df_summary_diff_soma  %>% 
  group_by(group) %>% 
 rstatix::identify_outliers(mean) 

  df_summary_diff_soma <-  df_summary_diff_soma [! (cell %in% outliers$cell), ]
  
df_summary_diff_soma$group %>% table()
  
```



```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
my_comparisons <- list(c("DMSO_perfused", "DMSO_non-perfused"), c("CK-666_perfused", "CK-666_non-perfused"), c("DMSO_perfused", "CK-666_perfused"), c("DMSO_non-perfused", "CK-666_non-perfused"))

 df_summary_diff_soma %>% #mutate(exp = factor(exp, levels=c("DMSO", "CK-666")))  %>%
  
 ggplot(aes(x=group, y=mean, fill=exp)) + 
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)+
  geom_boxplot(width=0.5, fill="white", outlier.shape = NA)  +
  geom_point(aes(fill=exp, group=cell), position = position_jitter(0.1))+
 # geom_line(aes(), position = position_dodge(0.05)) +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=F, method="t.test")+
 #scale_y_continuous( expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-25, 5), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 7))+
  
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
  
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 

 #plotly::ggplotly(p)
```
```{r}
ggsave(
  "CK666_DMSO_soma_length_50.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")

dev.off()
```

# compare the length change between perfused and non-perfused neurite (GC), CK-666 vs DMSO
```{r}
 length_df_neurite <- length_df[perfusion_compartment == "neurite"]
 length_df_neurite$perfusion <- "non-perfused" 
 length_df_neurite[ grepl("Neurite_1",  length_df_neurite$neurite), ]$perfusion <- "perfused"
 
 df_summary_diff <-  length_df_neurite %>% 
  group_by(perfusion, cell, exp) %>%  
  rstatix::get_summary_stats(Diff) %>% 
  as.data.table()
 
 df_summary_diff$group <- paste(df_summary_diff$exp, df_summary_diff$perfusion, sep = "_")
```

# remove outliers
```{r}
outliers <-  df_summary_diff %>% 
  group_by(group) %>% 
 rstatix::identify_outliers(mean) 

df_summary_diff <-  df_summary_diff [! (cell %in% outliers$cell), ]
  
df_summary_diff$group %>% table()  
  
df_summary_diff %>% group_by(group) %>%  
  rstatix::get_summary_stats(mean)

```


```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
my_comparisons <- list(c("CK-666_non-perfused", "CK-666_perfused"), c("DMSO_non-perfused", "DMSO_perfused"), c("CK-666_non-perfused", "DMSO_non-perfused"), c("CK-666_perfused", "DMSO_perfused"))

  df_summary_diff %>% mutate(group = factor(group, levels=c("DMSO_non-perfused", "CK-666_non-perfused", "DMSO_perfused", "CK-666_perfused")))  %>%
  
ggplot(aes(x=group, y=mean, fill=perfusion)) + 
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.2, fill="white", outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(aes(fill=perfusion, group=cell), position = position_dodge(0.1)) +
# geom_line(aes(group=cell), position = position_dodge(0.1)) +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=F, method="t.test") +
 scale_y_continuous( expand = c(0, 0), 
                     limits = c(-50, 40), 
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8))+
  
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
  
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "CK666_DMSO_neurite_length.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")

#dev.off()
```
